chart.canvas.role_description._description: The role description announced by screen readers when the chart canvas receives focus.

chart.canvas.label.bar._description: The aria-label for the bar chart canvas element.

chart.canvas.label.line._description: The aria-label for the line chart canvas element.

chart.canvas.label.donut._description: The aria-label for the donut chart canvas element.

chart.focus_element.multi_series.descrip._description: The template for the screen-reader description of the currently focused chart element.
chart.focus_element.multi_series.descrip._2: Total series count in the chart
chart.focus_element.multi_series.descrip._6: Total data points in the series

chart.focus_element.single_series.descri._description: The template for the screen-reader description of the currently focused chart element.
chart.focus_element.single_series.descri._3: Total data points in the series

chart.legend.aria_label._description: The label for the chart legend

chart.legend.legend_item.aria_descriptio._description: The screen-reader description attached to each legend button, explaining how to interact with it.
chart.legend.legend_item.aria_descriptio.message: Press Space or Enter to toggle inclusion in chart.

chart.legend.legend_item.aria_label._description: The aria-label for a legend button.

chart.menu.label._description: The label for the chart menu

chart.menu.view_data_table._description: The label for the 'View data table' chart menu item

chart.menu.view_data_table.aria_label._description: The aria label for the 'View data table' chart menu item

chart_data_grid.category_column_name._description: The label for the pinned category column

chart_data_grid.close_button._description: The label for the close button

chart.summary.bar_chart._description: The auto-generated screen-reader summary intro for a standard vertical bar chart.

chart.summary.line_chart._description: The auto-generated screen-reader summary intro for a line chart.

chart.summary.donut_chart._description: The auto-generated screen-reader summary intro for a donut chart.

chart.summary.category_axis._description: Sentence describing the category axis in the auto-generated chart summary.
chart.summary.category_axis.message: The chart has a category axis displaying {0}.

chart.summary.measure_axis._description: Sentence describing the value axis in the auto-generated chart summary.
chart.summary.measure_axis.message: The chart has a measure axis displaying {0}.
